entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'I've created the fixed version of UnifiedAgentProcessor that addresses all the critical issues:

Key Fixes Applied:
HTML Entities Removed - Replaced " with proper PowerShell quotes "

Malformed URLs Fixed - Added .Trim() to remove trailing spaces from endpoints

Proper Closure Handling - Added .GetNewClosure() to scriptblocks to ensure $this context

Improved Processor Selection - Returns $null instead of blindly falling back to first processor

Better Error Handling - Added null check for processor selection

Safe Module Loading - Test script now uses Import-Module instead of Invoke-Expression

Files Created:
UnifiedAgentProcessor-Fixed.psm1 - The corrected version

Test-Agent-Fixed.ps1 - Safe test script using proper module import

The fixed version maintains all the original functionality while resolving the security and reliability issues. Run Test-Agent-Fixed.ps1 to verify all fixes are working correctly.'
